proximity.title: Proximity-First Ranking
proximity.desc: Technicians are sorted by real distance from you using PostGIS spatial indexes.

verified.title: Verified Only
verified.desc: Every listed technician is identity-verified before appearing on the platform.

emergency.title: Emergency Ready
emergency.desc: Gas leaks, short circuits, floods — we detect urgency and prioritize nearest help.

language.title: Tamil & English
language.desc: Full support for Tamil and English so anyone can use the platform comfortably.

reviews.title: Real Reviews
reviews.desc: Ratings are earned through actual service completions — no fake reviews.

availability.title: Live Availability
availability.desc: Technician availability is tracked in real-time — no more calling unavailable numbers.

search.emergencyNote: for emergencies, call the nearest technician immediately. Do NOT attempt DIY repairs.
search.locationFallback: Location not supported. Using Chennai as default.
search.locationError: Could not detect location. Using Chennai as default.
search.demoMode: ℹ️ Demo mode — Intelligence scores shown from local model. Connect backend for live data.
search.noTechSubtitle: Try increasing the search radius or selecting a different category

riskMessages.Critical: 🚨 CRITICAL — This is life-threatening. Call nearest technician immediately.
riskMessages.High: ⚠️ HIGH PRIORITY — Dispatch in progress. Do not attempt DIY repairs.
riskMessages.Medium: Service required soon. Verified technician being allocated.
riskMessages.Low: Routine service request. Best available technician matched.

chat.title: Sevai Hub Intelligence
chat.welcome:
வணக்கம்! 👋 I'm your Sevai Hub Intelligence Assistant.

Describe your problem and I'll:
• Score your emergency risk
• Find nearest verified technician
• Show Trust Index + ETA
chat.help:
I can help you find the nearest service provider! Tell me your problem — like *water leaking*, *no electricity*, *gas smell*, etc. 😊

Type naturally or pick a quick reply below.

emergency.critical:
🚨 EMERGENCY ALERT — CRITICAL PRIORITY

Emergency Risk Level: {risk}% (Critical)

Immediate action required! I'm locating the nearest available **{cat}** {icon} for you.

⚠️ Do NOT attempt to fix this yourself. Stay away and ensure safety first!

📞 If life-threatening, call 112 (Emergency Services) immediately.
emergency.high:
⚠️ HIGH PRIORITY REQUEST

Emergency Risk Level: {risk}% (High)

Locating the nearest **{cat}** {icon} for you.

Technicians are ranked by Trust Index + proximity for fastest response. ✅
emergency.normal:
Got it! Service request logged.

Emergency Risk Level: {risk}% ({level})

Finding the best **{cat}** {icon} near you.

Trust Index and proximity ranking applied. Your technician is selected for maximum reliability. ✅
